title: Large Video to Transcript output
description: Links to transcript result rows, the run summary, and generated transcript/audio artifacts.

results.title: Transcript results
results.description: Dataset rows with status, quality, duration, word count, speaker count, and signed artifact links for each uploaded media file.

summary.title: Run summary
summary.description: JSON summary with total successful and failed media files.

artifacts.title: Generated artifacts
artifacts.description: Key-value store records for MP3, TXT, JSON, SRT, VTT, quality report, and ZIP outputs.
